name: ipp-score-cell
title: Fuse IppScoreCell
description: Fuse-canon IPP (Ideal Partner Profile) score cell. Renders partner fit score (0-100) as colored mini-bar + tabular-nums numeric. Used as the leading sortable column in @fuse/partner-grid Discover Results. 3-stop threshold palette (HO-grid-1 lock): ≥75 = bg-[var(--plum-9)] (crown) / ≥50 = bg-[var(--sand-11)] / <50 = bg-[var(--sand-8)]. Per fuse-web HR 2: bar moves through plum → sand, never green/yellow/red. Null/undefined guard renders muted -- placeholder. CLAUDE.md rule 20: cell has no provenance — no tooltip, no hover, no strengths/gaps surfacing. Plain-language factors live in the panel IPP fit tab; references live in the Evidence tab. 3px-wide × 20px-tall bar keeps the indicator visually restrained in dense grid contexts. Source: fuse-web components/grid/ipp-score-cell.tsx.
